productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Max Tailwind Grey Sports Shoes
description: The nike Air Max Tailwind+ 2 is a running shoe built for the neutral to under pronator who requires enhanced cushioning.UpperBreathable mesh upper ensures a cool and comfortable environmentHardy Flywire sewn into the upper for targeted support and an enhanced FitNearly seamless upper design through the forefoot and no-sew synthetic overlays to minimize the likelihood of irritationInjected TPU in the toe for extra protection and great fit in the forefootFull inner sleeve to provide a secure fit and great step-in feelMidsoleMolded EVA sockliner for lightweight plush comfort and supportFull-length Cushion midsole for soft, responsive cushioning and exceptional impact protection for a smooth transitionrunning specific, low-pressure Air-Sole units in the forefoot and heel for a smooth, stable rideA heel design that adds structure and stability for reinforced medial supportFoam pillars around the heel Air-Sole unit for maximum support and durabilityOutsoleEnvironmentally preferred rubber outsole in a waffle fill pattern for durable traction on mixed terrainBRS 1000 carbon rubber in the heel for abrasion resistanceDeep flex grooves to promote smooth transition from heel strike through toe-offshoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
